scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.clean:nuke: pnpm store prune && rm -rf node_modules pnpm-lock.yaml packages/*/dist && pnpm install && vue-tsc -b tsconfig.json && pnpm build
scripts.simulate:prod: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/dist && pnpm install && pnpm build:types && pnpm --filter client build-only && pnpm --filter server start
